__fixture__.name: external_effect_lineage_failed_after_side_effect
__fixture__.scenario: A provider comment publish returned a half-complete acknowledgement: the provider created the comment but the follow-up notification webhook failed mid-dispatch, leaving residual provider-side state. The runtime records an external_effect_lineage_outcome_record with outcome_class = failed_after_side_effect and reconciliation_state = pending_admin_action so the post-incident reconciliation hook in the emergency-action model picks it up without inventing its own reconciliation vocabulary. residual_effect_summary carries a short reviewable sentence; raw secret material and raw payload bytes do not appear.

residual_effect_summary: Provider-side comment created and visible; follow-up notification webhook did not ack within the bounded window. Admin reconciliation required to confirm or replay the notification.
